headline: Jim Cramer Considers Applied Materials to Be One of the “Best Capital Expenditure Stocks”
summary: Applied Materials, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMAT) was among the stocks Jim Cramer covered on Mad Money as he discussed the wave of IPOs being the market’s possible biggest threat.
